verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Lord of eternity, Mystery behind the veil, Lord over heaven and earth, God of Israel.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Come with Your wisdom and power, Clothed in Your honor and strength, Lord, hear the cry of our hearts, Come, O conquering King! And every eye will see Your glory fill the sky…

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Adonai! Adonai! Every knee will bow to You, Lord Most High! Adonai! Adonai! You alone are God Every tongue will cry, Adonai!

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Here Jerusalem waits, Praises lifted on high. Here the beautiful gates Long to see you arise! When all of Zion sings, "Blessed Is the Lord!"

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: /: You are Lord over all the earth. :/ 8x
